name: Tremendous Rewards & Payouts API
what_it_does: Tremendous REST API for rewards, incentives, and payout distribution platform. Enables AI agents to send digital gift cards and prepaid Visa rewards, manage research participant payment and incentive programs, handle employee recognition and spot bonus distribution, access reward catalog management with 1000+ options, retrieve payment status and redemption tracking, manage bulk reward send campaigns, handle international reward delivery in 200+ countries, access survey and research platform integrations, retrieve reward analytics and reporting, and integrate reward automation with HR, survey, and marketing platforms.
use_cases: Sending research participant payments from UX research and survey agents
Distributing employee spot bonuses from HR recognition agents
Managing customer referral and loyalty rewards from marketing automation agents
Handling digital gift card distribution from incentive program agents
not_for: Mass contractor payouts requiring 1099 tax compliance
Enterprise B2B vendor payments without reward and incentive context
Payroll processing requiring employer tax compliance
best_when: A company running research panels, employee recognition programs, or customer incentive campaigns wants AI agents to automate reward selection, delivery, tracking, and reporting across a global recipient base.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE NOTE: Research participant payments may require IRB protocol compliance. Employee reward automation must integrate with HR policy and taxable benefit rules. International rewards may have import duty and tax implications for recipients.

auth.notes: Tremendous uses API key authentication with Bearer token format. Account-level API keys with test and production modes. Comprehensive developer documentation. Webhooks for order and reward status events. SDKs for Python, Node.js, Ruby, PHP. Test mode available without spending real funds.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test mode free; production requires funded account
pricing.paid_tiers: Fund account upfront; Tremendous charges 3% fee for some reward types; gift cards at face value
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Founded 2015. Digital rewards and payout platform. Used by 10,000+ companies including Uber, Airbnb, and Harvard. 1000+ reward options in 200+ countries. Strong research, HR, and marketing use cases. Competes with Rybbon and Giftbit for digital rewards.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk order endpoints available

known_agent_gotchas: Account balance required — automated reward sending fails if account runs out of funds; implement balance monitoring
Test mode vs production — always use test mode for integration testing; test mode sends do not deliver real rewards
No public MCP server — simple API key REST API with good documentation
Reward delivery timing — digital rewards delivered instantly; physical items have shipping delays
International tax implications — automated international rewards may trigger recipient tax obligations
HR taxable fringe benefits — employee rewards over $25 may be taxable; integrate with payroll for reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Reward and incentive payment data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key Bearer token. US. Recipient contact and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Rewards and payouts. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key. US. Recipient contact and reward transaction data.
